---
title: "The Rev. John Scarth"
---

## The Rev. John Scarth

**Dates:** (1826-1909)

### Description

Vicar of Holy Cross, Bearsted, Kent, 1884-1902, and Hon. Secretary of St Andrew’s Waterside Church Mission, 1871-1900

### Letters

- Letter from July 27th 1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
